open_agent_prs.title: Fix Impact report statistics to use outcome root-level resolver and objective mapping
uncheckedtypeassertion: recognize safe comma-ok form in var init and parenthesized assertions
fix(regexpcompileinfunction): resolve package identity via type checker instead of identifier name
fix: add git safe.directory to resolve dubious ownership error in safe_outputs job and gh-aw-node container
fix: prune stale container pins and move UpdateContainerPins to after compilation
safe-outputs: add `merge-pull-request` schema parity for `samples` and cross-repo targeting
Harden workflow_call jobs against GHES output masking for artifact prefixes and target repo resolution
Implement `mcp-scripts.dependencies` end-to-end with runtime-manager install flow and pinned release-tag validation
Add failure category filtering to report-failure-as-issue
feat(repo-memory): add format-json option to pretty-print JSON files before commit

notes: 10 open copilot-swe-agent PRs, all branch-based (is_fork=false). Fork-only triage policy → 0 PRs eligible for formal triage. 2 PRs closed/merged since last run (#39741, #39740). 6 new PRs since last run: #39767 (safe-outputs merge-pull-request), #39770 (container pins prune), #39771 (git safe.directory fix), #39773 (regexpcompileinfunction fix), #39774 (uncheckedtypeassertion fix), #39784 (impact report stats fix). Mix of drafts and ready-for-review PRs, all assigned to pelikhan except #39540 (dsyme).
